summary: Iteration 159: Organizer Guarantee UX Bug Fixes Testing. Both bugs have been successfully fixed: 1) pending_organizer_guarantee appointments now display 'Garantir le RDV' button in Actions requises section with correct label 'Votre garantie est requise pour activer ce rendez-vous'. 2) Dashboard handles ?guarantee_status=success URL parameter correctly with toast message and URL cleanup. The retry-organizer-guarantee API returns valid Stripe checkout_url. Card reuse flow also works (activates guarantee without Stripe redirect when user has saved card).

passed_tests.backend_timeline_api_structure: PASS - GET /api/appointments/my-timeline returns valid structure with action_required, upcoming, past, counts
passed_tests.backend_pending_organizer_guarantee_in_a: PASS - 15 items with needs_organizer_guarantee=true found in action_required section
passed_tests.backend_action_required_labels: PASS - All pending_organizer_guarantee items have correct label 'Votre garantie est requise pour activer ce rendez-vous'
passed_tests.backend_retry_guarantee_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/appointments/{id}/retry-organizer-guarantee endpoint exists and returns valid Stripe checkout_url
passed_tests.backend_appointment_detail: PASS - Test appointment 248ad6b9-50f9-42f8-b1b7-f58503923280 has status pending_organizer_guarantee with penalty_amount 10.0
passed_tests.frontend_dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with 'Actions requises' section showing 15 actions
passed_tests.frontend_guarantee_button_displayed: PASS - 8 'Garantir le RDV' buttons visible in ActionCard section
passed_tests.frontend_delete_button_displayed: PASS - 'Supprimer' buttons visible next to guarantee buttons
passed_tests.frontend_guarantee_label_displayed: PASS - 8 instances of 'Votre garantie est requise pour activer ce rendez-vous' label found
passed_tests.frontend_guarantee_button_click: PASS - Clicking 'Garantir le RDV' triggers API call to retry-organizer-guarantee endpoint
passed_tests.frontend_card_reuse_flow: PASS - When user has saved card, guarantee is activated without Stripe redirect (toast: 'Garantie validée avec votre carte par défaut. Invitations envoyées.')
passed_tests.frontend_guarantee_status_url_handling: PASS - Dashboard detects ?guarantee_status=success, shows toast 'Garantie validée ! Votre engagement est maintenant actif.', and cleans URL parameters
passed_tests.frontend_other_flows_not_broken: PASS - Relancer (31), Annuler (2), Supprimer (8), Voir détails (43) buttons all present and functional

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly flags pending_organizer_guarantee items with action_required=true and needs_organizer_guarantee=true
return_url='/dashboard' is correctly set in both create_appointment and retry-organizer-guarantee flows
Frontend ActionCard correctly shows 'Garantir le RDV' + 'Supprimer' buttons for needs_organizer_guarantee items
handleGuaranteeOrganizer correctly calls appointmentAPI.retryGuarantee() and handles both checkout_url redirect and card reuse activation
Dashboard useEffect correctly handles guarantee_status URL parameter with toast and URL cleanup
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with pending_organizer_guarantee status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Organizer guarantee UX bugs are fixed. pending_organizer_guarantee appointments now appear in Actions requises with 'Garantir le RDV' button. The retry-organizer-guarantee API returns Stripe checkout_url or activates via card reuse. Dashboard handles ?guarantee_status=success URL parameter correctly. All other flows (remind, cancel, delete) remain functional.
